title: Craore
description: Crafting ores from a specific type of stone and the ore itself
body:
This data pack adds Minecraft Crafting! You will have the opportunity to craft ore blocks.
You can craft:
- Coal Ore
- Copper Ore
- Iron Ore
- Gold Ore
- Redstone Ore
- Lapis lazuli Ore
- Diamond Ore
- Emerald Ore
- Nether Quartz Ore
- Nether Gold Ore

All these ores have crafting in the form of stone ore and deepslate!

The data pack is supported on the client and server side!
# 


### Support mods:

<details>
<summary>List of supported mods</summary>

- [Dimensional Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/dimensional-ores) (Since version **1.21**) appeared since v1.3.0
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) (Since version **1.21.1**) appeared since v1.4.0
- [Mystical Agriculture](https://modrinth.com/mod/mystical-agriculture) (Since version **1.21.1**) appeared since v1.4.0

</details>

Mods are supported only on stable versions of the game, stable versions are those versions that are considered the most used for importing mods.

**Example:** The Create mod is available on version 1.21.1, which means that Craore should have ore recipes from this mod only on version 1.21.1, on versions above these crafts will be removed until the next new stable version for mods appears. Let's say more global updates will be released for stable mod versions than for the most recent versions, since new ores are very rarely added to Minecraft and no innovations will be observed.

- Craore _1.4.0_ supports stable mod versions
- Craore _1.3.1_; _1.3.2_ and more, supports the latest vanilla versions

**Stable versions to support mods:**
- 1.21.1
- 1.20.1
- 1.19.2
- 1.16.5
